name: cowork-to-code-bridge
description: Run commands on the user's Mac from inside a Cowork sandbox via a small file-based bridge. Drop-in plugin: paste a URL, follow Cowork's prompts, done.

post_install.message:
cowork-to-code-bridge plugin installed. If you haven't already, run the Mac-side installer:

  curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/abhinaykrupa/cowork-to-code-bridge/main/install.sh | bash

Then ask: 'set up the cowork bridge' — I'll verify and confirm.
